title: Mini Creeper
description: Adds a small but deadly creeper that hunts players quickly.
body:
Mini Creeper adds a small but dangerous new mob to your world.

This tiny creeper is faster than the normal creeper and can quickly close the distance to its target. Its explosions are smaller than usual, making it a challenge without being overpowered — perfect for balanced survival gameplay.

✨ Features

Adds a new Mini Creeper mob

Smaller than the vanilla creeper

Faster movement speed

Explodes with a smaller radius than normal

Spawns naturally in the Overworld

Balanced for survival

📦 Notes

Designed to be fun and challenging, without breaking the game balance.
